title: Multiple Signatures from Gmail
excerpt: In a situation where you have more than 1 gmail accounts added/linked to your account. I want to be able to switch between signatures. Atm that is not possible but it would be great if a signature would be linked to a g-…

posts.author: travelintelligence (Wieger)
posts.cookedHtml:
In a situation where you have more than 1 gmail accounts added/linked to your account. I want to be able to switch between signatures. Atm that is not possible but it would be great if a signature would be linked to a g-mail account.

When you select x@gmail you get signature x. When you select y@gmail you get signature y.
